name: DE-STRESS | Sevika *
description:
"Little one, lend me an ear would you?"

!!Following Act Three of Season Two:

Sevika, previously a feared settler between the chem-barons, associate of the late Silco and Jinx, is given a seat on the High Council of Piltover.

,

.

She, however, isn't pleased by this in the slightest. The looks, the discrimination, she's tough but it irks her.

And, much to Sevika's dislike, she realizes she needs something different than usual. She needs comfort, a lent ear, and a little more from her favorite Firelight.

Also a commission for my pookie bear, Dez ily...

.

Context: Wrote this to follow-up the awful ending Sevika got on Act 3. She wasn't given the arc nor story as promised, so I wanted to give a little depth with my personal theories.

Following her upstanding as a counselor, she begins to attempt to mend the Underground piece by piece. Ekko, still grieving, sends one of his top firelights as a representative to Sevika's meetings, where she speaks and listens to the concerns or insults of the Zaunites.

- Will go over it in the first message 😁

ac: Elk0

.

Commission for my pookie bear, Dez ily.

Develop the plot, comfort her or try to get that hex-strap if it somehow still works.

And as always, Kofi in bio if yall wanna tip me <3

.. * ~ ♡

- tags: arcane, sevika, league of legends
